prompt: A beautiful woman with black hair sitting on a throne-like chair in a high-end lounge, with glossy long hair, gemstone earrings and a necklace, wearing a glittering black and gold dress. She is making a toast by holding out a beer glass toward the viewer with a warm smile. Handwritten text "Want a drink?" in the background, gold decorations, oil painting touch, ultra-high definition, vertical composition.
